description: A vertically oriented commemorative/holiday graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor marking 'National Skilled Trades Day.' The background is a dark color photograph of a man crouched and using a grinder or cutting tool inside an industrial vessel/tank, wearing a clear face shield and work clothes, with a shower of orange-yellow sparks fanning out across the right side of the frame against blue-gray metal. At the top center is the white line-art official seal of the Department of Labor ('DEPARTMENT OF LABOR / UNITED STATES OF AMERICA' encircling an eagle and shield emblem). Centered at the bottom in elegant white serif typography, flanked by small decorative dashes, is 'NATIONAL SKILLED TRADES DAY,' with 'NATIONAL' in roman caps and 'SKILLED TRADES DAY' in italic caps, and the URL 'dol.gov' beneath.
notable_text: NATIONAL SKILLED TRADES DAY / dol.gov / DEPARTMENT OF LABOR UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
